name: sitrep
description: Self-Improving Token-Reduced Embeddable Pipeline — a local, privacy-first context engineering system (multi-agent knowledge graph, RL compression, KV caching, hybrid retrieval, temporal memory).
author: SITREP Contributors
summary: Ingest documents into a local knowledge graph, query with adaptive compression, give feedback to learn fusion weights, and train a PPO compression agent — all fully local.

tools.name: sitrep_query
tools.description: Answer a question over the local SITREP knowledge base with confidence + token-reduction telemetry.

tools.name: sitrep_ingest
tools.description: Ingest raw text into the knowledge graph (chunking, fact/schema extraction, conflict resolution).

tools.name: sitrep_train
tools.description: Train the PPO compression agent on accumulated feedback.

tools.name: sitrep_stats
tools.description: Return aggregate statistics (schemas, facts, passages, fusion weights, token savings).

tools.name: sitrep_lineage
tools.description: Trace a decision by id, or list recent decisions.

setup: uv sync --extra rag --extra graph --extra llm --extra web
